{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321231744536FA43B3153E8471722"}"},"total":3112},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7532513740119835454","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这真的是一本值得大家去看的书，看到就是赚到，作者的文笔很好，也有很多搞笑的，看的时候差点把我笑死，但也有一些让人落泪的，总之，这本书值得大家看看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753806053,"group_id":"7460166122243902489","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"努力是为了让自己配得上喜欢的人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3tsVoS92Zx/ZZTcBK2Cf+U=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616560&x-signature=%2FYXVdYO%2FVKzIgYSc4FplMZloIxQ%3D","user_id":"100769592478","user_name":"暴跳如雷的阎魔罗王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100769592478","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7460166122243902489","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿】+【无cp】
上辈子裴泠考编上岸，兢兢业业从基层一路干到正厅，扫黑除恶打击一切违法犯罪，一颗红心正的发邪。
直到她进入快穿世界，手拿恶女剧本，天生坏种无恶不作，强的可怕，主角在她手底下都全靠光环苟到大结局。
系统：宿主你必须坏事做尽恶贯满盈，众叛亲离万人唾骂！
裴泠：没事哒没事哒的，我超坏哒，不信我狠一个给你们看看。
以身入局，单枪匹马杀穿棉北够不够狠？
重拳出击，把家暴男打到挂粪袋够不够狠？
手起刀落，把修仙界砍到断层算不算狠？
……
顶着反派的身份，你们正派不敢干的事，我反派敢！
路过的狗都要捅两刀。
蚂蚁窝都要用开水浇一浇。       
裴泠：你们谁坏的过我？       
终于，裴泠恶贯满盈，任务圆满完成，可以离开任务世界了，没想到……      
“她是个好人！”
“她真的好善良！”  
“她这些年也太不容易了！” 
“都是我们误会她了！”
 “这个世界总有人缝缝补补！替我们负重前行！”
 “终究是她一个人承受了所有！”
裴泠：我是恶女啊！谁让你们给我洗白的！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/960fa7dcbdb862d6219fa55859b49a46","author":"偶葱","author_id":"","book_id":"7460166122243902489","book_name":"快穿：我也不想这么坏啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7460523543512498713","read_count":"49959","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1065957"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"523","tags":"快穿,现代言情,系统,幻想言情,反派,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e389cc9d4e312540acffcbbbe081cef2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779290264&x-signature=VZSk8BOYNeskeID%2FvYfZ%2FiLgpJ0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1873164857781536","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"70"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321231744536FA43B3153E8471722"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":885,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8586,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":3491},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7506498375384662846","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"追平了来评分。我一般是不看颠文的，因为我扔不掉自己的脑子，每次看几章就因为觉得不合理看不下去弃文。但这本不一样！因为这本颠的爽啊！我扔掉脑子也要看！！！裴姐需要当恶女赚恶贯满盈值。所以裴姐是真杀人如麻，杀的全是坏人，超级爽！作者文笔好，颠的时候是真颠，爽的时候是真爽，感人的时候也是真感人。裴姐每个世界最后总被发现良苦用心“洗白”。快乐是读者的，悲伤是裴姐的。第二点让我喜欢的就是，不黑原世界女主，不仅不黑，还塑造的特别好。而且有几个世界，虽然是无cp，但是那种美好的羁绊真的好嗑。还记得第二世界叶璃说的，师傅、弟弟、师兄弟们都伤她骂她，唯有一人眷顾她，所以她即是我的道。我觉得裴姐结束快穿后，叶璃可以出现在她身边的，毕竟叶璃是仙了，踏碎虚空穿越世界也是可以的嘛！(作者只是把羁绊写得太好了！嗑cp都是我自己要嗑的！)上班上得不开心的一定要看看这本小说！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747744674,"group_id":"7460166122243902489","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+hgQGDpRBVcVxWG6iwXb5oyqqnx4zoAKXnxLlHekA6e","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1638722792076231","user_name":"空行悠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1638722792076231","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7460166122243902489","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿】+【无cp】

直到她进入快穿世界，手拿恶女剧本，天生坏种无恶不作，强的可怕，主角在她手底下都全靠光环苟到大结局。
系统：宿主你必须坏事做尽恶贯满盈，众叛亲离万人唾骂！
裴泠：没事哒没事哒的，我超坏哒，不信我狠一个给你们看看。

手起刀落，把修仙界砍到断层算不算狠？
……
顶着反派的身份，你们正派不敢干的事，我反派敢！
路过的狗都要捅两刀。
蚂蚁窝都要用开水浇一浇。       
裴泠：你们谁坏的过我？       
终于，裴泠恶贯满盈，任务圆满完成，可以离开任务世界了，没想到……      
“她是个好人！”
“她真的好善良！”

“都是我们误会她了！”
 “这个世界总有人缝缝补补！替我们负重前行！”

duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":42972,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":20568},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7512120879662252824","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第一个故事是最好看的，不仅逻辑通顺，笑点密集且自然，人物性格又突出又不突兀，结局也是真的煽情。第二个开始，有点硬凑的感觉，有个好故事但是写不出来的样子。第三个开始就有种还能写下去就不错了的意思了。不过写手要吃饭，不能像作家一样花大时间去琢磨一个作品，很正常。作者写出了第一个故事证明了实力，不是不会写，而是暂时不能写。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749055492,"group_id":"7460166122243902489","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzXXM6ByjQl5Obb+Pe3wvM4o5Y2CLHLa15xS2vtPqUVc","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3518063090612256","user_name":"老二柱子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3518063090612256","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663811859,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7460166122243902489","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿】+【无cp】
